questionHtml:
Which are examples of non-coding DNA?


A.  Dominant and recessive alleles

B.  Promoters and telomeres

C.  Oncogenes and tumour suppressor genes

D.  Introns and exons

meta.title: Which are examples of non-coding DNA? A. Dominant and recessive alleles B. Promoters and telomeres C. Oncogenes and tumour suppressor genes D. Introns and exons
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.14. Non-coding sequences in DNA do not code for polypeptides
